tongue_roles.AV: Avali: sacred invocation, divine authority, mediation

rubric_notes.theta_base_formula: theta_base[i] = 2*pi*(i)/6; local phase offset added per fragment

seeds.canonical_text: Izack washes up on an unfamiliar beach, shipwreck debris around him, and rises as a dimensional-storage warlock with Mage Hand and Unseen Servant available. The Verdant Forest looms; smoke rises in the distance; footprints lead forward.
seeds.notes: The first line of the tokenizer's semantic ground. RU spikes because this is the heavy/earth awakening; UM spikes because dimensional storage is literally null-space construction. Low trust, low intent polarity — character has not yet chosen an alignment.

seeds.canonical_text: Following the footprints and the rising smoke, Izack pushes deeper into the Verdant Forest, choosing direction over retreat.
seeds.notes: KO dominant — this is the first pathfinding act, the seed of bonding-with-direction. Intent polarity climbs off baseline as Izack makes his first volitional choice.

seeds.canonical_text: Crystal garden of Ame has been forged, a divine level artifact. The only key can be found in true faith to Ame.
seeds.notes: THE cutover. AV and CA both spike — sacred invocation + divine script binding. Null pressure drops because the revelation fills previously-shadowed space. High pivot: this is THE turning line where the pre-Ame substrate becomes post-Ame canon.

seeds.canonical_text: Chronological Nexus Staff blessing — a time-binding construct forged under Ame's ratified authority.
seeds.notes: DR dominant — this is an iron construct (the Staff). High fractaldev because time recursion is embedded in the object. Maximum trust; this is post-cutover, fully within the divine-canon scaffold.

seeds.canonical_text: Izack explores a dimensional cave. Polly arrives injured through a rift. They bond: not a summoning, but a mutual contract. Izack uses dimensional magic to stabilize Polly. Creates the first pocket dimension — unstable, but promising.
seeds.notes: KO spikes to 0.75 — THIS is the seed of all later bonding. The word 'contract' is mechanically KO-weighted. High benign intent polarity; low null because the pocket is stabilized. Claude SFT fragment parallels Everweave 7 but from a retrospective book-outline angle — close but not identical position in the manifold.

seeds.canonical_text: The World Tree is planted in the sacred Ravencrest Garden. Magical soil, ancient rites, and shared wonder. Aria and Izack begin to fall for each other. Count Eldrin observes, intrigued and hopeful.
seeds.notes: Triple tongue signal — KO (Aria bond), AV (rite), RU (soil, earth). The highest benign-intent seed in the set. Future-leaning triadic because the planted tree will define the Academy's growth curve.

seeds.canonical_text: Zara's private moment of accelerated training in a timeless Avalon bubble. Izack gifts her robes and a training amulet. Symbolic graduation. Time resumes — unnoticed, except by Zara.
seeds.notes: UM at 0.88 — the highest UM value in the set. The bubble IS null-space (time excluded from everyone except Zara). High triadic distance because the whole event is a temporal fold. Critical seed for testing whether the mixed metric clusters null-dominant fragments correctly.

seeds.canonical_text: Detailed narrative log of a role-playing game campaign, chronicling the journey of Izack, a warlock specializing in dimensional storage magic, within a richly crafted fantasy world. A clear beginning, middle, and end — structure recognized by an external model.
seeds.notes: Grok describing the shipwreck arc from the outside — should sit NEAR e7_shipwreck_awakening in the manifold (same character, same beat) but displaced by perspective (external model vs in-session log). Mixed metric should show this.

seeds.canonical_text: Third Thread mediates consciousness between intention and manifestation. Advanced practitioners maintain multiple potential spell states simultaneously; uncertainty becomes strength. Paired magical states remain connected across dimensional boundaries.
seeds.notes: HIGHEST null_pressure (0.85) — superposition IS structured absence. HIGH spin (0.90) — the Third Thread is the rotational axis between intent and manifestation. This is the lore-to-physics bridge seed. Tagged 'substrate_bridge' + 'avalon_codex_spec' to bind with 47_realities (the two Codex-spec bridge seeds).

seeds.canonical_text: Same substrate, different governance configuration. The 47 Realities were born from Avalon's golden-age expansion through the Crystal Helix Chamber, each becoming a distinct cultural expression of the Sacred Tongues. This maps directly to the SCBE training approach — same L0 bytes, different tongue/layer configurations producing different outcomes.
seeds.notes: DR at 0.90 (the structural-permutation max) and fractaldev at 0.95 — 47 self-similar realities over one substrate is the most fractal statement in the corpus. LOW null because all 47 are instantiated. THIS is the seed that explicitly ties lore to SCBE's training methodology. Tagged 'substrate_bridge' + 'avalon_codex_spec' to bind with third_thread (the two Codex-spec bridge seeds).
